message:
test: update test summary with new runtime boot and robot schema results

Add two new test entries to the test log summary:
- system_test_runtime_boot: currently failing (daemon exits before
  SIGTERM test can run), tracking as known failure
- test_robot_schemas: passing (6/6 schema validation tests)

Total test count updated from 18 to 20, failed count reflects the
new runtime boot regression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 {
-  "failed": 0,
+  "failed": 1,
   "passed": 7,
   "results": [
     {
@@ -189,6 +189,17 @@
       "stdout_path": "tests/logs/collectors_test_sysmoni_mock.out",
       "test_name": "collectors_test_sysmoni_mock"
     },
+    {
+      "assertions": 0,
+      "duration_ms": 1376,
+      "error_excerpt": "+ set -euo pipefail\n+++ dirname /data/projects/vibe_cockpit/tests/e2e/system/test_runtime_boot.sh\n++ cd /data/projects/vibe_cockpit/tests/e2e/system\n++ pwd\n+ SCRIPT_DIR=/data/projects/vibe_cockpit/tests/e2e/system\n+ exec bash /data/projects/vibe_cockpit/tests/e2e/system/e2e_runtime_boot.sh\nFAIL: Daemon exited before SIGTERM test could run",
+      "exit_code": 1,
+      "failures": 1,
+      "status": "fail",
+      "stderr_path": "tests/logs/system_test_runtime_boot.err",
+      "stdout_path": "tests/logs/system_test_runtime_boot.out",
+      "test_name": "system_test_runtime_boot"
+    },
     {
       "assertions": 0,
       "duration_ms": 787,
@@ -199,8 +210,16 @@
       "stderr_path": "tests/logs/system_test_smoke.err",
       "stdout_path": "tests/logs/system_test_smoke.out",
       "test_name": "system_test_smoke"
+    },
+    {
+      "status": "passed",
+      "test_name": "test_robot_schemas",
+      "tests_failed": 0,
+      "tests_passed": 6,
+      "tests_run": 6,
+      "timestamp": "2026-01-29T11:33:34-05:00"
     }
   ],
   "skipped": 11,
-  "total": 18
+  "total": 20
 }
